---
title: "Project Poster"
subtitle: "A single-page visual summary of the investigation"
toc: false
---

Our poster condenses the entire investigation — methodology, key evidence, and findings — into one visual narrative.

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-doc solid" href="poster/poster_v2.html" target="_blank">🔍 Open full-screen poster</a>
<a class="btn-doc" href="poster/poster_v2.jpg" download>⬇️ Download as image (JPG)</a>
<a class="btn-doc" href="poster/poster_v2_editable.pptx" download>📊 Download editable (PPTX)</a>
:::

::: {.poster-wrap}
<a href="poster/poster_v2.html" target="_blank" title="Open the full-screen poster">
<img src="poster/poster_v2.jpg" alt="Project HarborCrest poster — VAST Challenge 2026 MC1">
</a>
:::

<p style="text-align:center;color:#64748b;font-size:.9rem;">Click the poster to open the interactive full-screen version.</p>
